title: autobench.command.acknowledged v1
description: Acknowledgement emitted by autobench after processing an autobench.command. Confirms whether the command was accepted or reports an error. Source: /autobench.

command_id.description: ULID of the command being acknowledged (echoed from autobench.command).

action.description: The action from the original command (echoed for correlation without a join).

status.description: Whether the command was accepted and applied, or rejected with an error.

error_message.description: Optional. Human-readable error detail when status is 'error'.
